task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the correct business.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Northwind Traders' displayed in the top navigation or header of the Manager.io interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to create a new purchase invoice.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Purchase Invoices' tab being active and a 'New Purchase Invoice' form opened.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct supplier is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Exotic Liquids' selected in the Supplier dropdown or field on the purchase invoice form.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct inventory item and description are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Chang' selected in the Item column of the invoice line, and the text 'Freight charges for Chang shipment' entered in the Description field.

task_completion.description: Verify the quantity is left blank or set to zero to properly record a landed cost.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Qty' (Quantity) column for the 'Chang' line item. It must be completely empty or explicitly show '0'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct amount is entered and the invoice is saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '45.00' in the Unit Price or Amount column. The final screenshot should show the saved/view mode of the Purchase Invoice with a total of $45.00.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Manager.io web or desktop interface being clicked and interacted with, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely entered the data into the form.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show intermediate steps like dropdown menus open, typing in progress, or the edit screen, rather than just jumping straight to the final saved invoice.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to manipulate the page.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure no browser 'Inspect Element' or developer console panels are open in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task must be performed in the 'Northwind Traders' business. The purchase invoice must be for the supplier 'Exotic Liquids'. The line item must be the inventory item 'Chang'. The description on the invoice must be exactly 'Freight charges for Chang shipment'. The amount must be exactly 45.00. Crucially, to record this as a landed cost (freight-in) rather than a new stock purchase, the quantity (Qty) field for the 'Chang' line item must be exactly 0 or left blank.
